I don’t sell a simple diet plan or workout routine. I sell a mindset and lifestyle you can follow for life.

A diet plan you can get from ChatGPT or any website, but what I offer is the real transformation.

FAQs

ALL YOU NEED TO KNOW

What happens after I subscribe to your program?

1. Personalized Plan Creation: You’ll receive a detailed questionnaire to gather all the necessary information about your lifestyle, including your daily routine and favorite foods.

2. Tailored to Your Life: Your plan will be customized to fit seamlessly into your schedule, without requiring drastic changes.

3. Quick Turnaround: Once you submit the questionnaire and complete the payment, your fully customized plan will be ready within 4-5 days.

What does the program include?

1. Flexible Diet Plan: Adjusted to your needs, preferences, and BMR, focusing on your favorite foods.

2. Daily Check-ins & Updates: Stay motivated with daily support.

3. WhatsApp Q&A: Got questions? I’m here for you anytime.

4. Supplement Recommendations (protein powder – creatine – etc) (optional): Provided only if you’re interested.

5. Cardio & Abs Routines: To help you tone up and shed fat.

6. Gym & Home Workouts: Includes videos to ensure perfect form.

7. Direct Access to Me: You’ll have my personal number for any support or motivation.

What are the available package options?

🌟Golden Package:
Get daily responses on WhatsApp! You can message us anytime, and we’ll be there to support you every day.

💰Price: Customized to match your goals.

🌟Silver Package:
Get weekly responses on WhatsApp! We’ll check in once a week to keep you on track.

💰 Price: Affordable, without cutting corners on your progress.

Both packages offer the same great program, just with different levels of contact. Choose what works best for you, and let’s get started! 🚀

Refund Policy?

• 1-Month Package: No refunds are available once your plan has started, even if only 1 day has passed.
• 3-Month Package:
• If you request a refund within the first 30 days, you will be charged for 1 month, and the remaining balance will be refunded.
• If you request a refund after 30 days but before 60 days, you will be charged for 2 months, and the remaining balance will be refunded.
• After 60 days, no refunds are available.

Start Your Journey
